evidence: All 18 cudf_backend tests passed with zero regressions
Code structure verified: _configure_cuda_worker_environment() sets CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES and CUDA_DEVICE_ORDER before cudf/rmm imports in _process_chunk_on_device()
_create_process_pool() uses max_tasks_per_child=1 on Windows to prevent worker reuse contamination
VAL-CUDA-001.reason: Worker processes correctly pin CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES before importing heavyweight CUDA libraries (cudf, rmm). The test_worker_isolation_sets_cuda_visible_devices_before_worker_imports test uses a custom __import__ hook to verify that at the exact moment cudf and rmm are imported, CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES is already set to the target device ID. ProcessPoolExecutor is created with max_tasks_per_child=1 on Windows to force fresh child processes and prevent cross-device CUDA context contamination.
